title: Our Customer Reviews - Tours Northwest - Seattle, WA
content: The PERFECT way to see Rainier if you don’t have access to a car. Our tour guide, John, was so knowledgeable and kind and took us to so many great spots. You could tell that he really loved the park and wanted us to have a great time. We loved having the free time to walk around and explore on our own at Paradise. It was a great mix of being with the group while also getting to do some of your own adventuring. #### Great Time. We were blessed to have an absolutely beautiful day. Our tour guide Jeff was wonderful . Knowledgeable, many anecdotes about the city , and the history. Also took us through many of the the surrounding communities and their contributions to the growth of Seattle. I was in Seattle for a short period of time and wanted to get out of the city for a day. #### GREAT TOUR AND GUIDE. We had a great tour of Seattle!

title: Seattle: Guided Underground Walking Tour | GetYourGuide
content: Explore Seattle's underground passageways on a guided walking tour beneath Pioneer Square. *   5 5 out of 5 stars  L Lynn – United States June 30, 2026 - Verified booking  Our guide was excellent and very informative also had a sense of humor     5 5 out of 5 stars  J Jenny – United States June 30, 2026 - Verified booking  Everyone talking about not being underground the whole time, etc. Read more     5 5 out of 5 stars  H Heather – United States June 29, 2026 - Verified booking  Our tour guide Patty was amazing, and made learning about the history of the underground fun! 5 5 out of 5 stars  D David – Hong Kong June 26, 2026 - Verified booking  A different perspective and a chance to see something a little different. 5 5 out of 5 stars  J Joanne – United States June 25, 2026 - Verified booking  We had a great time. *   Explore the underground passageways of Seattle on a guided walking tour.
